programs.title: 2026 Proof Silver Eagle: America's 250th Anniversary Release
programs.desc: Join Mike Mezack for a historic release, the first-ever 1776-2026 dual-date Proof Silver Eagle with Liberty Bell privy mark, struck in .999 silver for America's 250th Anniversary; a one-year-only issue collectors won't want to miss.

programs.title: Hope for Pain Sufferers
programs.desc: In this compelling investigation, John Walsh delves into OmegaXL and its natural origins; discover how this innovative supplement can provide relief from joint pain and improve your quality of life, all grounded in extensive research.

programs.title: POOF! Bye Bye Under Eye Bags!
programs.desc: Plexaderm helps reduce Under Eye Bags, Dark Circles, and Wrinkles in just 10 minutes!

programs.title: Healthy Joints for Life With Rich Diana
programs.desc: Healthy Joints for Life! Episode 1 of world-renowned orthopedist and longevity researcher Dr. Rich Diana's new series on healthy aging; learn about the real causes behind joint aging, and the promising new drug, supplement and therapy options.

programs.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programs.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programs.title: The Three Stooges
programs.desc: Set in the civil war, the Stooges are spies for the north; they impersonate southern officers and infiltrate the enemy ranks to get valuable information.
